steps.title: Use fossil evidence
steps.content: The species were identified from fossil bones more than 55 million years old and are called prehistoric penguins. That context points to species from the past, not species alive today.

steps.title: Infer their status
steps.content: A is unsupported, C contradicts the size detail about one species, and D is never discussed. The fossil and prehistoric context supports that the species are extinct. The answer is B.
